title: T-057 — Seed: ccp_hazard_classifications reference + sample HACCP plan (P1 onboarding)
prompt:
# T-057 — Seed CCP hazard taxonomy + sample HACCP plan

PRD: §16.3 reference tables, §7.1 09-e-01, ADR-034

## Goal
Register ccp_hazard_classifications reference table (industry-configurable) with 4 baseline hazard types per §6.3 enum + sample HACCP plan with 3 CCPs (1 biological, 1 chemical, 1 physical) seeded into the demo tenant for onboarding verification.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration 0146 registers reference_tables row code='ccp_hazard_classifications' with schema_json {code,label,severity_default,category,i18n jsonb}. Seeds 4 baseline rows: biological (severity_default=critical), chemical (major), physical (major), allergen (critical).
2. Migration 0147 seeds a sample HACCP plan for the demo tenant: plan_code='HACCP-DEMO-COOKED-MEAT', 3 CCPs: CCP-01 'Cooking' (biological, min=72, max=NULL, unit='°C'), CCP-02 'Metal Detection' (physical, no numeric limits, observational), CCP-03 'Allergen Cleaning' (allergen, ATP RLU max=10). Plan status='draft' so demo doesn't carry an auto-active plan.
3. Server helper apps/web/src/server/quality/ccp/hazardClassifications.ts exporting getHazardClassifications(orgId).

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0146_ccp_hazard_classifications_reftable.sql [create]
- packages/db/migrations/0147_haccp_demo_seed.sql [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/ccp/hazardClassifications.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/ccp/__tests__/hazardClassifications.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0146 applied, when SELECT FROM reference_tables_rows WHERE table_code='ccp_hazard_classifications' runs, then 4 seed rows exist matching the hazard_type CHECK enum in §6.3 (biological, chemical, physical, allergen) with severity_default values
2. Given migration 0147 applied with the demo tenant, when SELECT from haccp_plans + haccp_ccps for the demo plan runs, then the plan exists with status='draft' and exactly 3 CCPs (biological CCP-01 with limit_min=72, physical CCP-02 observational, allergen CCP-03 with limit_max=10)
3. Given a multi-tenant test (tenant A and tenant B), when migration 0147 runs, then the demo seed is scoped to the demo tenant only — tenant A and B see 0 haccp_plans (assert via RLS)

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: hazardClassifications.test.ts asserting all 3 ACs before migrations
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter web test hazardClassifications'

## Risk red lines
- Demo seed must be scoped to demo tenant only — multi-tenant isolation required
- Hazard type values must match §6.3 hazard_type CHECK enum verbatim
- Default plan status='draft' — never auto-activate (avoid demo data accidentally affecting other tenants' compliance KPIs)

pipeline_inputs.description: ccp_hazard_classifications reference table (4 seeds) + demo HACCP plan with 3 CCPs (biological/physical/allergen) for onboarding verification.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0146 registers ccp_hazard_classifications reference table with 4 seed rows (biological/chemical/physical/allergen) matching §6.3 hazard_type CHECK enum verbatim. Migration 0147 seeds a sample HACCP plan + 3 CCPs scoped to the demo tenant only — status='draft' to avoid affecting compliance KPIs. Server helper exposes getHazardClassifications. Multi-tenant isolation verified.
out_of_scope: Do not seed monitoring records (would inflate KPIs)
Do not auto-activate the demo plan
Do not seed plans for non-demo tenants

Given multi-tenant test, when 0127 runs, then demo seed is scoped to demo tenant only — tenants A and B see 0 haccp_plans (RLS isolation)

Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter web test hazardClassifications'
